title: Tammia Hollusen
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:9tammi.jpg]] |name=Tammia Hollusen |homeworld=[[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]][[Star Wars (1977) 30|''Star Wars'' (1977) 30]] |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender= |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=[[Tammia Hollusen's mother]] |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Peace Brigade]]{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-9-battlfields-of-the-clone-wars|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 9: Battlefields of the Clone Wars}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|But sometimes-- when you ''believe'' in something enough-- you do it anyway.''"
"''E-even if everyone else says you ''can't''...? That it's ''impossible...?"
"''Maybe ''especially'' then.|Leia Organa and Tammia Hollusen|}} '''Tammia Hollusen''', also known as '''Tammi''', was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who, in her youth, lived and worked for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]]. She aided in Princess [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] escape from [[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]]. Tammi planted a single flower on Metalorn to show the first seeds of rebellion to the Empire. Hollusen eventually joined the [[Peace Brigade]], but ultimately left the group. Hollusen had become the leader of Metalorn by [[32 ABY/Legends|32 ABY]], when Leia Organa Solo returned to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to conduct peace negotiations with Hollusen. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 30|''Star Wars'' (1977) 30]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 30}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-9-battlfields-of-the-clone-wars|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 9: Battlefields of the Clone Wars}} {{1stID|Tammia Hollusen}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Tammia Hollusen}} {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Hollusen, Tammia}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Metalorn residents]] [[Category:Peace Brigaders]] [[Category:Planetary leaders]] [[Category:Resistance fighters]]
